name: lofi.cafe
author: lofi-cafe
tagline: Retro-themed lo-fi music streaming. Pixel art visuals, 24/7 beats, zero distraction. The internet's coziest study lounge.

name: Rainy Mood
author: rainymood
tagline: Rain sounds for sleep, study, and relaxation. One page, one sound, infinite calm. The original ambient rain site since 2010.

name: Drive & Listen
author: driveandlisten
tagline: Drive through any city in the world with local radio playing. Tokyo at night, Paris in the rain, LA at sunset.

name: Radio Garden
author: radio-garden
tagline: Spin the globe and tune into live radio from any corner of the planet. Thousands of stations, one interactive 3D Earth.

name: Moodist
author: moodist
tagline: Open-source ambient sound mixer. Blend rain, cafe chatter, fire crackle, and more. Free, no account, no ads, just vibes.

name: Window Swap
author: window-swap
tagline: Look out of someone else's window. Real video views from real people around the world. A quiet, beautiful human connection.

name: Noisli
author: noisli
tagline: Create your perfect background sound mix for focus and productivity. Rain + thunder + coffee shop, your call.

name: myNoise
author: mynoise
tagline: Calibrated soundscapes for focus, sleep, and tinnitus relief. Over 200 generators crafted by an acoustic engineer.
